name: Glazed Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cracker crumbs or bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a loaf pan with cooking spray.
3. Combine all ingredients except ketchup and honey in a large bowl and mix well.
4. Turn the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 40 minutes.
5. Combine ketchup and honey in a small bowl.
6. Spread evenly over meatloaf and bake for 5 minutes longer.
